calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Charles Brown was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Charles Powell.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Amended

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-27-2005 Reset To Oct-13-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Charles Brown, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Petitioner was not able to provide Proof of Publication to the Court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Matter is continued to Oct. 13, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. for Proof of Publication.
